section.heading: Solicitation of views of certain entities

content.p: In carrying out this part, the Secretary, as appropriate, shall solicit the views of the States and other appropriate entities.

section.sourceCredit: (July 1, 1944, ch. 373, title XIX, § 1951, as added Pub. L. 102–321, title II, § 203(a), July 10, 1992, 106 Stat. 408.)
